title: strongylodon archboldianus
intro: Strongylodon archboldianus, also known as the "water lily tree," is a plant species native to the Philippines, characterized by its large, leathery leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and prevent the formation of blood clots. The health benefits of Strongylodon archboldianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and capsules.
